name: Western Alliance Bancorporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/400th Interest in a Share of 4.250% Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Western Alliance Bancorporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/400th Interest in a Share of 4.250% Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A represents a fractional ownership in preferred stock issued by Western Alliance Bancorporation. The depositary shares offer a fixed dividend rate and rank senior to common stock in liquidation. The nature of the company is a financial institution.
